particulars.description: As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the chargor with full title guarantee charges to the lender: by way of a first legal mortgage, the property, being the freehold property comprised in a transfer of part dated 26 january 2026 between (1) the chargor; and (2) brian leslie harold faulkner known as lot c, manor farm barns, stocklinch, ilminster, TA19 9JG registered at the land registry under part of title number WS24789 and as shown edged red on the plan attached. Please see charge for more details.

As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the chargor with full title guarantee charges to the lender: by way of a first legal mortgage, the property, being the freehold property comprised in a transfer of part dated 23 october 2025 between (1) the chargor; and (2) brian leslie harold faulkner known as manor farm barns, stocklinch, ilminster, TA19 9JG registered at the land registry under part of title number WS24789 and as shown edged red on the plan attached.. Please see charge for more details.

As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the borrower with full title guarantee charges to the lender by way of a first legal mortgage, the property, being the freehold property comprised in a transfer dated 15 november 2022 between (I) somerset county council, and (ii) the borrower known as lot 1, lot 2 and lot 3 coldharbour farm barns, donyatt, ilminster, somerset TA19 0RN forming part of the property registered at the land registry under title number ST17632 and as shown edged and coloured red in respect of lot 1, edged and coloured blue in respect of lot 2 and edged and coloured green in respect of lot 3 on the plan attached to this deed.. Please see the charge document for full details.

The borrower, with full title guarantee, charges by way of legal mortgage, in favour of the lender, as security for the payment and discharge of the secured obligations, the freehold property specified in schedule 1 of the charging document, being the property known as land adjoining new cross court, new cross hill, new cross, south petherton, TA13 5HZ and also known as oak tree caravan, the old fruit farm, new cross, south petherton, TA13 5HD as shown edged red and blue on the plan attached to this deed comprised within (1) a transfer dated 12 august 2020 between (I) new court fruit farms limited, william henry john hebditch and elizabeth anne hebditch (as transferor) and (ii) the borrower (as transferee) all of which land is now registered at land registry under title number WS91697 and (2) a transfer dated on or around the date of this deed forming part of the land registered at the land registry under title numbers WS84849 and WS59574 between (I) new court fruit farms limited, william henry john hebditch and elizabeth anne hebditch and (ii) the borrower (as transferee).. Please see charge document for more details.
Gullifords garage, 24 st mary's street, nether stowey, bridgwater, TA5 1LJ registered under title number ST329169.

The borrower with full title guarantee charges to the lender; by way of first legal mortgage, each property specified in schedule 1 of the charge document, being the freehold property known as cox's farm, silver street, kingsbury episcopi, martock, somerset TA12 6AX shown edged blue on the plan annexed to the charge document registered with title number WS66807 and the freehold land at cox's farm, silver street, kingsbury episcopi, martock, somerset TA12 6AX shown edged green on the plan annexed to the charge document forming part of title number WS52800; by way of fixed charge all properties acquired by the borrower in the future; all present and future interests of the borrower not effectively mortgaged or charged under the preceding provisions, in or over, freehold or leasehold property; all intellectual property.. Please see the charge document for full details.
